title: PI AGENT FULL COURSE: Master Pi Agent in 30 Minutes
summary: A course teaching Pi Agent, a framework for building real coding agents. The video promises to teach Pi Agent fundamentals in 30 minutes and covers practical implementation for AI-assisted coding.
writeup: This David Ondrej course teaches Pi Agent, a framework for building real coding agents, condensing the fundamentals into a 30-minute walkthrough. It covers practical implementation for AI-assisted coding rather than theory. The takeaway is a working understanding of how to set up and use Pi Agent to construct coding agents.
